title: mcs_permissions
description: Server Essentials, but for vanilla minecraft made in datapack format.
body:
Permissions & Essentials

Mr_Chibi's Permissions & Essentials is a minecraft datapack! It's Singleplayer & Multiplayer Friendly! This datapack was created for server owners of vanilla / Realms to have something close to spigot or paper. It includes: "Commands", "Limited Creative", "Ranks", & "Warps".

What Unique Features does pack offer?

  • Commands
  • Ranks
  • Limited Creative
  • Homes
  • Warps

How it was written in:

  • Json
  • Mcfunction
